scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs');['package-lock.json','yarn.lock'].forEach(f=>{try{fs.rmSync(f,{force:true});}catch{}}); const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''; if(!ua.startsWith('pnpm/') && !process.env.EAS_BUILD){console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1);}"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
